title: crataegus coccinea var. rotundifolia
intro: Crataegus coccinea var. rotundifolia, also known as the Round-leaved Scarlet Hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is rich in flavonoids, anthocyanins, and other polyphenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The Round-leaved Scarlet Hawthorn has been traditionally used to support cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of heart failure, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with herbal preparations often recommending a combination of this plant with other cardio-protective herbs to enhance its benefits.
